result.stdout:
Mio.Generata v1.1.36+abbcf18dede87d693e0ca65e42911762abe2fd35

A CLI tool to generate project structure including Areas, Controllers, Views, Models, ViewModels, Interfaces, Services, and basic CRUD 🐼.

Usage:
  Mio.Generata [command] [options]

Options:
  -c, --check     Checking and update latest version [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information
  -v, --version   Show version information

Commands:
  gen  Start generating project structure. [, , ]

A CLI tool to generate project structure including Areas, Controllers, Views, Models, ViewModels, Interfaces, Services, and basic CRUD 🐼.

Usage:
  Mio.Generata [command] [options]

Options:
  -c, --check     Checking and update latest version [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help  Show help and usage information

result.stdout:
Mio.Generata v1.1.36+abbcf18dede87d693e0ca65e42911762abe2fd35

gen: Start generating project structure.

Usage:
  Mio.Generata gen [<area-name> [<model-name> [<root-path>]]] [options]

Arguments:
  <area-name>   Area Name, e.g., Blog
  <model-name>  Model Name, e.g., Blog
  <root-path>   The root path of the project, where the .csproj file is located. If the current path already contains the .csproj file, you can leave this empty.

Options:
  -a, --ajax        Using create and update in modal with ajax [default: False]
  -e, --enable-old  Enable compatibility with old source code that doesn't have the MioBaseController module, such as project 'XSchool'. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information

commands.payload:
Mio.Generata v1.1.36+abbcf18dede87d693e0ca65e42911762abe2fd35

gen: Start generating project structure.

Usage:
  Mio.Generata gen [<area-name> [<model-name> [<root-path>]]] [options]

Arguments:
  <area-name>   Area Name, e.g., Blog
  <model-name>  Model Name, e.g., Blog
  <root-path>   The root path of the project, where the .csproj file is located. If the current path already contains the .csproj file, you can leave this empty.

Options:
  -a, --ajax        Using create and update in modal with ajax [default: False]
  -e, --enable-old  Enable compatibility with old source code that doesn't have the MioBaseController module, such as project 'XSchool'. [default: False]
  -?, -h, --help    Show help and usage information
